audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L433-435 (`if (bidUsdValue < minBidUsdValue) revert BidValueTooLow(...)`) is unconditionally applied on the only bid execution path. `_getAssetPrice` is called with `withValidation=true` guaranteeing a non-zero price, so `bidUsdValue` is correctly computed; `AuctionBidder.bid()` delegates to this same function, leaving no bypass path.
